name: Wireless Headphones
description: Premium over-ear headphones with rich sound, plush ear cushions, and up to 30 hours of playback on a single charge.

name: Mechanical Keyboard
description: Tactile switches, per-key RGB lighting, and a durable aluminum frame built for daily typing and gaming.

name: USB-C Hub
description: Expand one USB-C port into HDMI, USB-A, SD card slots, and pass-through charging for laptops and tablets.

name: Laptop Stand
description: Ergonomic aluminum stand that elevates your screen to eye level and improves airflow beneath your laptop.

name: Smart Watch
description: Fitness tracking, heart-rate monitoring, notifications, and a bright always-on display in a slim profile.

name: Desk Lamp
description: Adjustable LED desk lamp with warm-to-cool color temperature and flicker-free brightness control.

name: Studio Microphone
description: Cardioid condenser microphone ideal for podcasts, streaming, and voice-over with crisp, broadcast-quality audio.

name: Wireless Mouse
description: Lightweight ergonomic mouse with precision tracking, silent clicks, and multi-device Bluetooth pairing.
